title: Making A Gravity Generator From A Broken Printer
description:
If you want to have a look at those special videos become a member and join by clicking this link https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC4AkVj-qnJxNtKuz3rkq16A/join
I was asked to do this after the gravity battery video and i thought it would be a bit of fun and a cool way to re-use or upcycle a broken printer.
